mechanism_narrative: A rising CPIAUCSL inflation trend while FEDFUNDS is unchanged or falling forces real policy rates lower, easing financial conditions and supporting S&P 500 returns over the next month through multiple expansion.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered periods with higher CPIAUCSL and flat-to-lower FEDFUNDS produce negative 20d SPX returns in most cases, or if the conditional hit rate stays below 55% over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in UNRATE above its recent trend marks weakening labor demand and higher recession risk, which depresses equity multiples and causes negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-rise triggers are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of occurrences, or if the sign of the conditional average return is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in RSAFS indicates weakening consumer spending and revenue momentum, which lowers near-term earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if falling RSAFS is not associated with lower 5d SPX returns, or if the sign consistency is below 52% in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO with stable labor conditions indicates improving industrial output and broader cyclical momentum, which supports S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through stronger earnings revisions.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO acceleration combined with non-deteriorating UNRATE fails to produce positive 60d SPX returns, or if the conditional mean return is not above the unconditional baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A high FEDFUNDS level after a prior tightening cycle compresses valuation multiples and raises discount rates, creating negative S&P 500 returns over the next month when policy remains restrictive.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% do not show negative 20d SPX returns relative to lower-rate periods, or if the rate-level effect disappears after controlling for inflation.

mechanism_narrative: A joint improvement in GDPC1 and RSAFS signals broad demand acceleration, which should lift earnings expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous strength in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to outperform other periods on 60d SPX returns, or if the interaction term is insignificant in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden PAYEMS slowdown signals payroll momentum deterioration before broader earnings downgrades, so equity returns should be negative over the next week when payroll growth falls sharply.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS falls by more than 150k in one month
failure_condition: Reject if payroll-drop triggers are followed by positive 5d SPX returns more often than negative returns, or if the signal loses predictive power after 2020.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST rises while INDPRO is also rising, the economy is likely in a synchronized cyclical rebound that supports risk appetite and higher S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if housing starts acceleration without concurrent industrial improvement does not distinguish positive 20d SPX outcomes, or if the joint signal underperforms the unconditional mean return.
